title: helichrysum aureum var. candidum
intro: Helichrysum aureum var. candidum, also known as 'Gold Everlasting', is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and silvery-green foliage. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum aureum var. candidum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Helichrysum aureum var. candidum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
